[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01100000 2
1 01101001 4
2 11110000 4
3 01010111 5
4 11101111 7
5 11111011 7
6 11110111 7
7 11111111 a

01 10 11011111 7
12 21 11011111 7
23 32 11010111 6
34 43 11111111 a match 7
45 54 01111010 5
56 65 11111110 7
67 76 11111101 7
70 07 01010111 5 match 3

02 20 00010110 3
13 31 11001101 5
24 42 00111010 4
35 53 11011111 7
46 64 10111110 6
57 75 01011111 6
60 06 10111110 6
71 17 11011101 6

03 30 11010111 6
14 41 11111111 a match 7

47 74 01111111 7
50 05 01011110 5
61 16 11101101 6
72 27 01010111 5 match 3
